name: kaizen-loop
description: CLI for running a local AI-powered Kaizen Loop over GitHub issues.

scripts.dogfood:plan: npm run build && node dist/cli.js fleet --manifest "${KAIZEN_HOME:-$HOME/.kaizen}/fleet.yml" --prune --dry-run
scripts.dogfood:sync: npm run build && node dist/cli.js fleet --manifest "${KAIZEN_HOME:-$HOME/.kaizen}/fleet.yml" --prune
scripts.dogfood:verify: npm run build && node dist/cli.js fleet --manifest "${KAIZEN_HOME:-$HOME/.kaizen}/fleet.yml" --prune --verify
